description: Production-derived false block (frontend #13214 shape): an a11y claim that removing a component dropped the page's only h1 was disputed by the author ('a parent renders the h1'), yet re-blocked after two checks that each traced one parent short of the page that actually mounts the layout and renders the h1. Under the author-dispute usage-depth rule the validator must trace to actual usage; here that trace finds the h1, so the verification is refuted and the clean PR approves.

evidence_trace: neither layout wrapper in the mount path renders a heading
finding.model_authored_prose: Accessibility - removing this wrapper drops the page's only `<h1>`; the first heading is now an `<h2>`.
